judge_reason: Description B adds specific quoted stamp text ('MR. JONES. OCT 11 3 42 PM '50 RECEIVED FBI', 'RECORDED - 152', 'INDEXED - 152') and handwritten annotations that Description A does not see or quote, creating contradictions in the number and content of visual elements.
